description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular floor plan and a flat roof. The exterior walls are primarily finished in a dark color, with some sections in white, and there are multiple windows distributed along the sides. The interior layout is visible, showing several rooms including what appears to be a living area, bedrooms, a kitchen, and a bathroom with blue tiling. The structure includes a garage or carport area with a distinct open section, and the main entrance is likely located at the front, adjacent to a paved area. The windows are arranged in a linear pattern, and the building features both interior and exterior doors. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, dark and white exterior walls, and a visible interior layout including multiple rooms and a garage area.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angle highlighting the open garage/carport area and the main entrance, with interior rooms visible through the roof.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from the rear, emphasizing the dark exterior wall and the paved area adjacent to the garage.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow with several windows and a clear view of the interior room arrangement.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite end, showing the long hallway, multiple rooms, and the blue-tiled bathroom.
